questions.q: How many teams will participate in the FIFA World Cup from 2026 onwards?
questions.fact: FIFA expanded to 48 teams for 2026, co-hosted by USA, Canada and Mexico.

questions.q: Which country has won the most FIFA World Cup titles?
questions.fact: Brazil has won 5 times — 1958, 1962, 1970, 1994, and 2002.

questions.q: In which year was the very first FIFA World Cup held?
questions.fact: The inaugural World Cup was held in Uruguay in 1930.

questions.q: Which country hosted the 2022 FIFA World Cup?
questions.fact: Qatar 2022 was the first World Cup held in the Middle East.

questions.q: Who won the Golden Ball award at the 2022 World Cup?
questions.fact: Messi won his first World Cup and the Golden Ball in Qatar 2022.

questions.q: Which goalkeeper won the Golden Glove at the 2022 World Cup?
questions.fact: Martínez saved crucial penalties in the semi-final and the final shootout.

questions.q: Who is the all-time top scorer in FIFA World Cup history?
questions.fact: Miroslav Klose scored 16 World Cup goals across 4 tournaments for Germany.

questions.q: Which team finished as runners-up at the 2022 World Cup?
questions.fact: France lost on penalties to Argentina — Mbappé scored a hat-trick in that final.

questions.q: Which nation was the first African team to reach a World Cup semi-final in 2022?
questions.fact: Morocco beat Portugal to become the first African side in a World Cup semi-final.

questions.q: Who won the Golden Boot at the 2022 World Cup?
questions.fact: Mbappé scored 8 goals including a hat-trick in the final.

questions.q: How many goals did Mbappé score in the 2022 World Cup final?
questions.fact: Mbappé's hat-trick was only the second ever in a World Cup final.

questions.q: Which country has reached 3 World Cup finals but never won?
questions.fact: The Netherlands reached the final in 1974, 1978 and 2010 — losing all three.

questions.q: Where will the 2026 FIFA World Cup be hosted?
questions.fact: 2026 will be the first World Cup hosted by three nations.

questions.q: Who scored the famous Hand of God goal?
questions.fact: Maradona's handball against England in 1986 is football's most controversial moment.

questions.q: Which team knocked out Brazil in the 2022 World Cup quarter-finals?
questions.fact: Croatia eliminated Brazil on penalties after a 1-1 draw in normal and extra time.

questions.q: In which year did Spain win their first FIFA World Cup?
questions.fact: Spain beat Netherlands 1-0 in South Africa 2010. Iniesta scored the winner in extra time.

questions.q: Which nation hosted the 2018 FIFA World Cup?
questions.fact: Russia hosted 2018. France beat Croatia 4-2 in the final in Moscow.

questions.q: Who was the top scorer of the 2018 FIFA World Cup?
questions.fact: Harry Kane won the 2018 Golden Boot with 6 goals including two hat-tricks.

questions.q: Which team was beaten 7-1 by Germany at the 2014 World Cup?
questions.fact: Germany's 7-1 demolition of Brazil in the semi-final is called the Mineirazo.

questions.q: Who scored the Goal of the Century at the 1986 World Cup?
questions.fact: Maradona dribbled past 5 England players — voted the greatest World Cup goal ever.
